nodes.itemHTML: • Kedrostars7.7k - Kedro is a data and development workflow framework that implements best practices for data pipelines with an eye towards productionizing machine learning models.

nodes.categoryHTML: Tunneling, WebRTC, Web Socket Servers and Other Routers
nodes.itemHTML: • segment.com — Hub to translate and route events to other third-party services. 100,000 events/month free

nodes.categoryHTML: Tunneling, WebRTC, Web Socket Servers and Other Routers
nodes.itemHTML: • webhookrelay.com — Manage, debug, fan-out and proxy all your webhooks to public or internal (ie: localhost) destinations. Also, expose servers running in a private network over a tunnel by getting a public HTTP endpoint (https://yoursubdomain.webrelay.io <----> http://localhost:8080).
